summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of UnifyBricks premium landing page redesign. All 10 sections render perfectly with premium design, proper color scheme, and responsive layout.
passed_tests: Navbar renders with UnifyBricks logo, nav links (Platform, Developers, Security, Pricing), Log in text, and golden Get Started button
Hero section renders with 190 countries badge, main heading with 'enterprise.' in gold, subtitle text, two CTA buttons, floating badges (0.3s settlement, PCI DSS Level 1)
3D Globe (cobe) renders perfectly in hero section on desktop with golden markers and floating currency badges
Trusted By marquee section shows company names scrolling (Apex Global, TrustCo Finance, CapVest, NovaPay, etc.)
Stats section shows 4 stats in blue text: 190+ Countries, $2B+ Processed, 0.3s Settlement, 99.99% Uptime
Platform Capabilities section has bento grid with 4 cards: Global Network, Programmability, Transparent FX, Compliance
Treasury & Cross-Border section with left text + right image, bullet points and 'Explore Global Coverage' link
Developer-First section with terminal-style code window (syntax highlighted) and feature grid (Webhooks, Real-time settlement, SDKs, Encrypted APIs)
Security & Compliance section with 4 badge cards: PCI DSS Level 1, AML Compliant, Regulated Entity, GDPR & CCPA
CTA section with 'Ready to scale globally with confidence?' heading and two buttons (Request a Demo, View API Docs)
Footer with UnifyBricks logo, Platform/Developers/Company link columns, copyright text, legal links
Navbar becomes glassmorphic (white background with blur) when scrolling down
All sections have proper spacing and responsive layout
Color scheme uses #1434cb (deep blue) and #fdbb0a (golden yellow) consistently
Mobile responsive design works perfectly - mobile menu toggle, 3D globe hidden on mobile
Premium design with gradients, glassmorphism effects, animations, and proper Stripe-style aesthetics
